question: Skip the onion rings (you don't have them), but no onions on my burger

history.speaker: client
history.text: Skip the onion rings (you don't have them), but no onions on my burger

history.speaker: cashier
history.text: Okay, we don't serve onion rings, so we can skip those. Which one would you like?

history.speaker: cashier
history.text: We don't have any burgers without onions. How about a Big Mac? We can skip the onions if you'd like.
